description: Letter fragment in Judaeo-Arabic. Dated: 444, probably 444 AH = 1052/53 CE, but could theoretically be [1]444 Seleucid = 1132/33 CE. Approximately three lines on recto are preserved. The sender refers to the addressee as 'my brother' and alludes to how well he has treated him. Mentions a letter from Abū Saʿīd.
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
